5xWhy RCA: 1. Why did CI fail? The Tests workflow quality-assurance job failed in Run security audit. 2. Why did that step fail? make security-audit exited non-zero during pip-audit. 3. Why did pip-audit exit non-zero? The backend lockfile resolves vulnerable idna 3.11 and starlette 1.0.0. 4. Why were vulnerable versions installed in CI? make install/uv sync uses packages/pybackend/uv.lock, which pins those versions. 5. Why was the lockfile not safe? Dependency lower bounds allowed vulnerable resolved versions and the lockfile had not been upgraded after advisories introduced fixed versions. Root cause: backend dependency constraints/lockfile permit and pin vulnerable idna and starlette versions.

Plan: update backend dependency constraints to exclude the vulnerable audited versions by requiring idna>=3.15 and starlette>=1.0.1, refresh packages/pybackend/uv.lock with uv, then verify with make security-audit and make qa-quick before committing. Keep the change limited to dependency metadata/lockfile plus the mandatory ledger.
